reviews.review_description: This game is so much fun me and my 3 friends had so much fun on this. Plz keep this game updateing this game. I would recommend to anyone. I beat this game and wow it was really good

developer_response.body: The Game is getting a complete Rewrite, With new Lore and Monsters. Also thank you for the 5 star review.

reviews.review_description: It just creeped me out when I load in…
im one of the beta testers and wanted to see how the game was going and its still fun

I played this with my brother and it was insanely funny and scary, would not recomend  if you dont have anybody to play with, also good content for Youtube. (Is there only one map or do you unlock more somehow?)(this is so scary also just found the facilaty pleas make bigger 🙏) also will this cost money when full game comes out?( whats the discord didnt work in vr

developer_response.body:
EDIT: There is only one map because I want to get that one to be the best it can be before making more

Thanks so much! If you make a youtube video make sure to tag @CaveInc-offical and ill give it a watch

reviews.review_title: No instructions on how to join friends
reviews.review_description: Me and my friend tried to get in a match together but none of the buttons seem to do anything, me and him have tried over and over but nothing happened. Please give some instructions on how to join friends because nothing seems to be working for us

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: The servers should be back up

Sadly this is because the servers were shut down for a short while. We are working right now to set them back up! We are also planning to drop a major update.

reviews.review_description: This game is broke nobody plays it so pls get it so its not broke

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, We would like more information about how the game is broken so we may fix it

reviews.review_description: I respect it.it's the first game we've played with codes

reviews.review_title: When will game be back up
reviews.review_description: Me and my friend were trying to play the game but the button didn’t work so what I’m assuming is that the game is down and if it is when will it be up again cause I’m looking forward to playing it

developer_response.body: it should be back by now

reviews.review_title: Needs more people so I wrote an essay
reviews.review_description: Looking for a seamless VR horror experience? Cave Inc. delivers smooth, intuitive gameplay that keeps you immersed in its eerie atmosphere. With fluid movement and responsive controls, every moment feels natural, heightening the tension and thrill. Perfect for horror fans who value smooth gameplay!

If anyone likes horror then I suggest playing this game it makes scared that you're not alone and that is what it's supposed to do and it makes go and try to get coins to get items.Over all the creator did a pretty good job👍
Great game, but it needs more people to be playing it, so maybe ads for the game

I think it’s a very good game even though I didn’t try it


￼
i think its a good game
It’s a great concept, just there needs to be more to do and an objective. Maybe different types of monsters is a start.

developer_response.body: thank you for your feedback we are working on more content
